policy.fresh: 0-90 days since live check; still verify mutable instructions before real submission.
policy.stale: >180 days; refresh required before relying on source.
policy.unchecked: No recorded live check; must be treated as needs reverification.

recommendations: Run scripts/check_official_links_live.py --live in a networked maintenance environment.
Run scripts/live_source_check_matrix.py after live checks to refresh matrix data.
Run scripts/source_age_policy.py and scripts/release_health_dashboard.py before a release.
Do not mark unchecked sources as healthy in an offline release build.
